meaning: n.<俗>小酒馆,小咖啡店,酒馆跑堂者
examples: We ate in the restaurant, as opposed to the bistro.
To drink one last cup of coffeeat the Lyric Bistro in Clayton.
I decided to go to my favorite place a little bistro called daVinci's.
Lacuna, at The Maslow, is an all-day bistro that draws in Sandton's business crowds.
This place remains an unfailingly good address for a trencherman's feed of impeccably prepared bistro classics.
